prompt: Create a highly detailed photorealistic macro photograph of an ornate hand embroidery artwork in a round wooden embroidery hoop lying on a rustic wooden craft table. The embroidered design is a tarot-card-inspired portrait of a pink galah cockatoo as THE EMPRESS: the bird sits regally on a plush red-and-gold throne, wearing a jeweled gold crown topped with red, yellow, and white feathers, a delicate necklace with a red gemstone, and holding a golden scepter. The tapestry has a warm antique-gold background with stitched clouds, rolling fields of wheat, distant green hills, a small blue river, floral bouquets beside the throne, ornate filigree borders, the Roman numeral III at the top, and a bottom banner reading THE EMPRESS. Include one heart-shaped shield at the lower front of the throne with a Venus symbol embroidered in gold. The embroidery should look tangible and dimensional, with visible satin stitch, chain stitch, French knots, metallic gold thread, raised thread texture, and tiny variations in fiber direction. Surround the hoop with real craft supplies: a cardboard tray at upper left holding 12 visible embroidery floss bobbins in red, pink, yellow, white, olive green, dark green, gray, black, brown, rust, tan, and cream; 3 loose skeins of floss at lower left in peach, coral pink, and green; 1 paper color chart at the top with 6 heart-shaped stitched swatches labeled 742, 744, 745, 783, 780, and 3853; 1 pair of vintage gold scissors at upper right; 1 metal thimble; 1 small round brass bowl containing a pincushion; and a few stray golden and peach threads near the lower right edge. Use warm natural window light, shallow depth of field, crisp focus on the hoop, cozy artisan workspace mood, muted earthy colors, ultra-realistic textile detail, no digital illustration look.
